title: OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW TIGARD OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Outpatient Mental Health Services provide therapy, mental health assessments, treatment planning, medication management, skills training, and consultation. Community-based services may also be provided as needed. 8770 SW Scoffins Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday/Friday 7:30am-4pm, Tuesday-Thursday 7:30am-5:30pm Email (503) 645-9010 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 645-9010 Main phone (503) 645-9010 Intake (888) 645-1666 Intake Toll-free Intake (503) 645-9010 Intake (888) 645-1666 Toll-free Main phone (503) 645-9010 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP/Medicaid and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals or offer free or discounted services. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday/Friday 7:30am-4pm, Tuesday-Thursday 7:30am-5:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Bus 76 or 78 to the corner of SW Scoffins and Main Streets Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Medication Information/Management Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - STRENGTHENING FAMILIES PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
